summary: 完成 AC-2 三项报表从 Mock 改为对接真实后端 + AC-4 搜索架构统一确认 + AC-1 Stitch 存档确认

AC-2-fin-depreciation.evidence: 后端 getDepreciationStats() 通过 AssetMapper 查询 Asset 表按 purchase_date 汇总折旧；前端 useQuery 调用 GET /reports/depreciation-stats；ReportsPage.tsx 已移除硬编码 mock

AC-2-ops-maintenance.evidence: 后端 getMaintenanceStats() 通过 MaintenanceRecordMapper 按月统计维保记录数；前端 useQuery 调用 GET /reports/maintenance-stats；ReportsPage.tsx 已移除硬编码 mock

AC-2-ops-retirement.evidence: 后端 getRetirementStats() 通过 RetirementApplicationMapper 按月统计退役申请数；前端 useQuery 调用 GET /reports/retirement-stats；ReportsPage.tsx 已移除硬编码 mock

AC-4.evidence: SidebarLayout.tsx 第29行已 import GlobalSearch from '@/components/GlobalSearch'，第159行已使用 <GlobalSearch />，内联资产搜索按钮保留，Cmd+K 无冲突

commands_run.notes: FAILED — but NOT caused by these changes. Bug pre-exists in WorkOrderService.java using QueryWrapper.select(String) which is incompatible with the LambdaQueryWrapper generic type. Unrelated to our changes in ReportService/ReportController/ReportMonthlyDTO.

verification_results: vitest 677/677 ✅ | npm build 0 errors ✅ | mvn compile: pre-existing WorkOrderService.java bug (not caused by our changes)
